evidence_snippet: he kills Dacey Mormont by thrusting his axe into her stomach
Ser Ryman participated in the tourney at Lannisport
Ryman commands the Frey forces at the siege of Riverrun
When the Freys and Boltons betray Robb, an armored Ryman storms back into the hall
Ryman takes two thousand spears to meet with Ser Daven Lannister and Ser Forley Prester to begin the siege of Riverrun
On his way back to the Twins, Ryman and his escort of three knights and twelve men-at-arms are captured near Fairmarket
